　　吴玫能否适应机关工作？是任人收割？还是自主沉浮？工作与感情，婚姻与家庭，这一切能否成为桎梏吴玫成功的枷锁？
　　请与作者一起走入机关女人的精彩生活……。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/13800ac324b473f546be5fdbf21a271b","author":"北宫罗老头","author_id":"","book_id":"7539124126061972505","book_name":"机关女人","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#681008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"19.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":750,"name":"职场婚恋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=750&name=职场婚恋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":125,"name":"家庭","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=125&name=家庭&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":862,"name":"家长里短","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=862&name=家长里短&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":871,"name":"第一人称","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871&name=第一人称&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7539457746135958041","read_count":"190518","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"799942"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"379","tags":"职场婚恋,现代言情,家庭,家长里短,第一人称","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o2111c873f9ec6f2032a66a191c354cdc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779430761&x-signature=NRCtD0REa1sVwY1nTS2kKys4%2BIk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"91580538821","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"24"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231419219A8B26B1BF26C17ABDF4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":74,"forwarded_count":1,"listen_duration":3974,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7930,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":65942},"user_action":{"author":0,"
